  • Overview

  • Help
GoGo Chiang Mai

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AngryTeacher
    A fast, aggressive teacher that can walk through quest-mark and item tiles.
    ArcaneScholar
    Boy scholar with the blue (ice) element — high HP, moderate focus gain.
    BaseCharacterProfile
    Shared implementation of CharacterProfile that derives all resource paths from the character's gender and element.
    BaseTeacher
    Base class for all teacher enemy types in the game.
    BulletItem
    A collectible ammo item that spawns on item tiles and grants one spell shot.
    CellPane
    A single 40×40 pixel tile in the 20×20 game board grid.
    CharacterProfile
    Read-only description of one selectable scholar.
    CharacterRoster
    Static registry of all eight selectable scholar characters.
    CharacterSelectPane
    Character selection screen shown between level selection and the game start.
    Directions
    Cardinal directions used for player input, projectile travel, and AI pathfinding.
    GamePane
    The primary gameplay screen that renders the tile grid and drives the game loop.
    GameSystem
    Singleton that owns all mutable game state for the current play session.
    GirlBlueScholar
    Girl scholar with the blue (ice) element — high HP, moderate focus gain.
    GirlGreenScholar
    Girl scholar with the green (earth) element — balanced stats.
    GirlPurpleScholar
    Girl scholar with the purple (dark) element — above-average HP.
    GirlRedScholar
    Girl scholar with the red (fire) element — glass-cannon profile.
    GreenScholar
    Boy scholar with the green (earth) element — balanced stats.
    GuiUtils
    Shared UI utilities: pre-loaded sound effects, the custom pixel font, and factory methods for styled buttons and background images.
    HomePane
    The game's home / title screen.
    HowToPlayPane
    Scrollable "How to Play" instructions screen.
    Interactable
    Marks a game object that can be triggered by the player or a spell.
    LevelPane
    Level-selection screen showing available map levels.
    Main
    JavaFX application entry point for GoGo Chiang Mai — Escape Intania.
    Map
    Immutable data record for one game level's tile layout and point-of-interest positions.
    MapParser
    Parses a plain-text level map file from the classpath into a Map object.
    Moveable
    Marks a game entity that can move on the tile grid each tick.
    NormalTeacher
    A balanced chasing teacher that actively pursues the student.
    PurpleScholar
    Boy scholar with the purple (dark) element — above-average HP.
    Pursuer
    Mixin that provides greedy-chase pathfinding to a teacher.
    Question
    Immutable record for a single multiple-choice quiz question.
    QuestionMark
    An interactive computer terminal placed on quest tiles that presents a Java OOP question to the player.
    QuestionParser
    Parses a plain-text question file from the classpath into a list of Question objects.
    RedScholar
    Boy scholar with the red (fire) element — glass-cannon profile.
    ResourceManager
    Simple classpath image cache that avoids loading the same image more than once.
    SleepyTeacher
    A slow, high-HP chasing teacher that relentlessly pursues the student.
    SpellShot
    A projectile fired by the student that travels one tile per game tick until it hits a wall or a teacher.
    Student
    The player-controlled character that navigates the tile map.

    © 2025 GoGo Chiang Mai — ProgMeth Project
